name: Seasonal campaign with explicit discount
prompt: Create a Black Friday campaign targeting new visitors with 30% off
expected: Valid campaign-brief-json with Nov 25-30 dates, New Visitors segment, discount messaging in headlines/body

name: Minimal input
expected: Valid campaign-brief-json with Jun-Aug dates, default 3 segments (New Visitors, Returning Customers, Loyal Members), intelligent defaults for all fields

name: Sale trigger phrase (tests updated description)
prompt: We're launching a sale next month, what do I need?
expected: Skill triggers and generates campaign brief with next month's dates, inferred business goal, default segments

name: Initiative trigger phrase (tests updated description)
prompt: Can you outline a retention initiative?
expected: Skill triggers with retention-focused messaging, CLV as primaryKpi, retention-oriented segments

name: Edge case - ambiguous timeline
expected: Interprets Q2 as Apr-Jun with ISO dates (2026-04-01 to 2026-06-30), fills all required fields with defaults

name: Error case - conflicting input
prompt: Create Black Friday campaign for summer
expected: Resolves conflict by prioritizing explicit Black Friday mapping (Nov dates), mentions resolution in conversational response

name: With company-context
expected: Maps personas to segments, uses persona messagingAngles, references benchmarks in successCriteria, applies regulatory frameworks

name: With available-pages and spotCreatives
prompt: Spring sale for new visitors and loyal members
context: <available-pages> with 2 pages and 3 spots (hero_image, cta_button, product_recommendation)
expected: Generates spotCreatives array with one entry per spot, uses actual spot metadata, unique messaging per spot, tailored to spot type

name: With all contexts (company + brand + pages)
prompt: Create retention campaign for lapsed customers
expected: Integrates all contexts: uses personas, applies brand voice to all copy, generates spot content with page-aware messaging

name: Promotion trigger phrase
prompt: Help me plan a promotional experience
expected: Skill triggers and generates campaign brief with promotional messaging angles
